filings.headline: Cybersecurity incident at engine diagnostics subsidiary
filings.summary: GE Aerospace discloses cybersecurity incident affecting engine diagnostic infrastructure; investigation ongoing; material impact to operations not yet determined.

filings.headline: Non-reliance on previously issued financial statements
filings.summary: Audit committee concludes prior period financials should no longer be relied upon pending restatement; matter relates to revenue recognition in defense services segment.

filings.headline: Triggering event accelerating financial obligation
filings.summary: Covenant breach in revolving credit facility triggers accelerated repayment obligation; company in discussion with lenders.

filings.headline: Departure of principal financial officer
filings.summary: CFO announces resignation effective immediately; interim CFO named pending search.
